title: Rewrite the PRD into a buildable brief
summary: Turn the raw planning material into a product brief that an implementation loop can actually trust.
acceptance: The PRD names the user, problem, outcome, and core flows.
The PRD includes functional and non-functional requirements.
The summary is short enough to send every iteration without noise.
notes: If the source planning doc is vague, turn it into concrete assumptions and record them.
Do not invent hidden requirements without documenting them.
